top_signals.title: Iran warns Bulgaria against aiding US military operations
top_signals.summary: Iran’s foreign ministry spokesman warned Bulgaria on Tuesday against allowing the U.S. to use its territory for military operations against Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan eyes next homegrown passenger aircraft 3 years after SpaceJet's end
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Augustus raises $180 million Series B at $1 billion valuation to build the ‘Global Dollar Bank’
top_signals.summary: Augustus supports stablecoins alongside traditional payment rails including Swift, ACH, and SEPA, according to a press release.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: New British prime minister gains early defense win with Canada fighter jet tie-up
top_signals.summary: Canada has joined the GCAP fighter program as an observer, marking the first expansion beyond the founding members Britain, Italy and Japan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
